sections.paragraph:
Original: קרא

Transliteration: qerâ'

Phonetic: ker-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to call, read aloud, read out, shout
    1. (Peal)
      1. to call, proclaim
      2. to read aloud, read out
    2. (Ithpeel) to be summoned, be called

Origin: corresponding to H7121

TWOT entry: 2977

Part(s) of speech: Verb
